description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style chest of drawers with a dark, almost black finish and subtle reddish-brown wear marks, giving it a distressed, antique appearance. The front features four vertically stacked drawers, each adorned with a pair of ornate, metallic ring handles, adding a touch of classic elegance. The top surface is slightly curved and overhangs the body, while the sides and back are plain, with the sides showing a gentle inward curve and the back being flat and unadorned. The chest stands on four small, rounded feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall construction appears to be solid wood, with metal hardware for the handles. This piece would be suitable for use in an urban environment such as a sidewalk, garage, or entryway, providing both storage and decorative value.
description: A vintage-style, dark-finished chest of drawers with four drawers and ornate metal ring handles, featuring a distressed look and curved top.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with ornate metal ring handles and a slightly curved top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, gently curved side panel and the overhanging top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned back panel with visible wear marks.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain, curved side panel and visible drawer handles.
